scripts.name: click.ahk
scripts.description: Click at an absolute screen coordinate. Accepts x, y, optional button (Left/Right/Middle), and click count.

scripts.name: type.ahk
scripts.description: Type a string of text at the current focus point using SendText (verbatim, no hot-key interpretation).
scripts.uiautomation_replacement: desktop_set_value (ValuePattern or SendKeys via agent.py set_value)

scripts.name: send.ahk
scripts.description: Send an AHK key expression to the active window (e.g. '{Ctrl down}c{Ctrl up}'). Supports modifier keys and special keys that SendText does not.

scripts.name: window_close.ahk
scripts.description: Close a window matching a given title string. Uses AHK WinClose().
scripts.uiautomation_replacement: uiautomation ClosePattern via custom agent.py extension

scripts.name: window_move.ahk
scripts.description: Move and/or resize a window identified by title to given x, y, width, height coordinates.
scripts.uiautomation_replacement: uiautomation TransformPattern (move/resize) — not yet implemented in agent.py

scripts.name: media_control.ahk
scripts.description: Send media key commands: playpause, next, prev, volup, voldown, mute.

scripts.name: hotkey_daemon.ahk
scripts.description: Persistent global hotkey daemon. Registers Ctrl+Alt+N → Notepad and Ctrl+Alt+C → Calculator as example hotkeys.

scripts.name: clipboard_monitor.ahk
scripts.description: Monitor clipboard changes and append text content to clipboard_history.txt in the working directory.

scripts.name: app_launcher.ahk
scripts.description: Launch an application or document by file path using AHK Run().

scripts.name: window_tiler.ahk
scripts.description: Tile all visible, non-minimised windows in an evenly-spaced grid layout across the primary monitor.
